subcodes.first_line: O Javád! The fragrances of the Robe of Manifestation of the Ancient Lord are wafting throughout the realm of the world, and the lights of His countenance from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جواد نفحات قمیص ظهور مالک قدم در عرصه عالم متضوع است و انوار وجهش از افق
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
